info.title: Grand Arena API
info.description:
Read-only access to Grand Arena game data.

**Auth:** Pass API key via `x-api-key` header or `Authorization: Bearer` token.

**Rate limits:** Free (100/min), Basic (1000/min), Pro (5000/min). See response headers for usage.

**Get a key:** Visit https://developers.grandarena.gg to request API access.

**[Changelog](/docs/changelog)** — see what changed in each release.

ApiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key for authentication. Can also be passed as Bearer token in Authorization header.

details.description: Validation error details (only present for input validation errors)

gameEndedBy.description: Name of player who ended the game

matchDate.description: Match date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD), derived from the match schedule
Match date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD), derived from the match schedule

address.description: Wallet address of the payout recipient

schemeId.description: Scheme card ID (only for scheme-sourced rules)

EntryFee.description: Entry fee paid for this lineup

ownerAddress.description: Wallet address of the entry owner

scoringRules.description: Scoring rules from scheme cards and contest

scoreDetail.description: Per-moki score breakdowns and rule deltas

get.summary: Get multiple mokis by token IDs

200.description: Paginated performance history for the moki
Paginated training history for the moki

get.description: Returns win rate, average deposits/eliminations/wart distance, and win type breakdown across all non-bye matches.
Returns matches linked to this contest via shared matchGroups and date range. Use state filter to get only scored or scheduled matches.

200.description: Paginated list of matches in the contest

schema.description: Filter by wallet address. Finds cards owned via direct address or linked account.

get.summary: Get multiple card definitions by IDs

get.description: Requires at least one narrowing filter: `matchDate` or `mokiId`. Returns 400 if only broad filters like `state` or `gameType` are provided.

schema.description: Filter by moki ID (matches containing this moki)

200.description: Match statistics. Returns precomputed stats when available, a message when the match is not yet scored, or basic result data on cache miss.

get.description: Requires at least one narrowing filter: `matchDate`, `mokiId`, or `matchId`. Returns 400 if missing.

get.summary: Get match scores for a leaderboard
get.description: Get calculated scores for a match in the context of a specific leaderboard. Returns 404 if scores are not cached.
Get paginated leaderboard rankings from Redis cache. Returns 404 if leaderboard is not cached.
Get a specific Moki's rank and score in a leaderboard. Returns 404 if not found in cache.
Get leaderboard metadata from Redis cache. Returns 404 if not in cache.
Returns contests where showDate <= now, endDate > now, not completed, not cancelled.
Returns paginated lineup entries for a contest, sorted by score descending.
Returns paginated prize distribution records for a completed contest.
Returns paginated lineup entries for a user across all contests. Each entry includes a computed rank based on score position within its contest.
